title: Sky clock
body: A clock that carries its sky. Each zone shows not just the hour but the sun on its arc, the moon pulling water, the planetary hour walking its ancient rotation, the season a place is in. Time as a continuous field, not a number.
author: mike
source: chat 2026-04-20 — 'it's not a collab clock. it's just a clock. it's visualizing time, zodiac, sun, moons, planets, water levels, temperatures, all how they're all influencing each other'

zones.label: El Segundo

rituals.label: LAX redeyes whispering over the bay
refinery night crew change, stack flames flickering
Hyperion hum on the southern breeze
marine layer at its thickest
surf check at El Porto, wetsuits in the lot
LAX arrival rush over Main Street
Richmond St Elementary drop-off
aerospace offices filling (Raytheon, Aerospace Corp)
layer burning off, sun punching through
lunch walks down Richmond
rituals.data: 🍴 trending searches: Superba · Eat at Joe's · El Segundo Brewing

rituals.label: onshore flow strengthens, Pacific wins back the air
school pickup, surf at El Porto filling in
Strand golden hour to Manhattan
rituals.data: 🚴 Strand counter: ~4,200 riders + walkers logged today

rituals.label: sunset crowd on the bluff, patios at The Deck
aircraft climbing out over the water
airport lulls, coyotes on PCH

zones.seasonal: April · June gloom still a month off, 62–68°F afternoons, jacarandas starting

zones.label: Medway, MA
zones.region: Charles River headwaters · New England exurb

rituals.label: pond quiet, train horns from Franklin, owls
earliest commuters onto 109 → I-495
Dunkin line forming, commuter rail lights in Franklin
school buses on Main, yellow past Oakland Park
coffee crowd at Cassidy's, NPR on kitchen radios
town quiet, Choate Pond laps, library shelving
Restaurant 45 fills, House of Pizza ovens up
dogs on Choate Park, long afternoon
rituals.data: 🌡 56°F · Charles River gauge holding · wind SW 8 kt

rituals.label: middle + high bus return, Little League warmup
rituals.data: 🚍 Medway HS dismissal 2:18 · 🥎 game vs Holliston 5:30

rituals.label: crossing guards at 109 & Main
commute reverse from I-495, dinner smells drifting
porch lights, peeper frogs starting up
Sox or Pats noise through a window
pond quiet, train horns from Franklin

zones.seasonal: April · mud season ending, spring peepers going, maples budding, woodcocks at dusk

zones.label: NYC

rituals.label: after-curtain supper, halal carts finishing up
Katz's late crowd, delivery e-bikes humming
bagel ovens fired at Ess-a, newspaper drops
Fulton Fish Market closing, doorman shifts
first coffee carts open, garbage trucks ebbing
Lex line crush, 4/5 express standing-room only
bodega bacon-egg-cheese, elevator latte cups
Midtown meeting marathon starts
Halal Guys line on 53rd, midtown lunch in 15
sidewalk chess in Washington Square
rituals.data: 🌡 58°F · 🚇 Lex line 4 min late · ❇ cherry + magnolia peak

rituals.label: kids walking home, museum crowds
rituals.data: 🎨 MoMA queue ~30 min · 🖼 Met: Asian wing opening

rituals.label: bike messengers outrunning commuters
bridge + tunnel outbound, happy hour spills
Broadway curtain, after-theater steakhouse
Brooklyn-bound L, Williamsburg last call
night bus + diner circuit, 24h pizza windows

zones.seasonal: April · cherry + magnolia peak in Central + Prospect, forsythia gone, 60°F on a good day

zones.label: London

rituals.label: last Tube, night bus home
Thames slack, foxes on the bins
cabbies at the all-night caff, Billingsgate trucks
Tube rush, Pret queues, oyster-card symphony
meeting-room Tube, canteen runs, biscuit trolleys
pub lunch in the sunshine
post-lunch slump, tea trolleys roll
evening pints spilling onto the pavement
long dinners, parks emptying at sunset
rituals.data: 🍽 OpenTable peak · 🌳 Hyde Park gates 8:30pm · trending: sakura blossoms Regent's Park

rituals.label: night buses loading at Trafalgar

zones.seasonal: April · daffodils done, bluebells in the woods, light until 8pm

zones.label: Mallorca

rituals.label: quiet, stars, fishing boats easing out of Andratx
bakers pulling ensaïmada from stone ovens
café con leche, Mercat de l'Olivar opens
cyclists cranking the Tramuntana passes
paella prep at the seaside chiringuitos
siesta, shutters down
kids off school, futbol on the plaça
passeig on the harbour, sunset on Port d'Andratx
rituals.data: 🌊 sea 16°C · light 1.5m swell at Cala Barca · 3 ferries in PMI tonight

rituals.label: late dinner, tapas spilling out, raki of the island (hierbas)
rituals.data: 🍽 peak OpenTable · trending on TheFork: Celler Sa Premsa, Sa Foradada

rituals.label: nightfall on the Badia de Palma

zones.seasonal: April · almond blossom fading, sea still 16°C, cyclists on the Serra in peak season

zones.label: Istanbul

rituals.label: seagulls over empty ferries, trawler lights on Marmara
fajr call from a thousand minarets
simit vendors, ferries throbbing Eminönü ↔ Kadıköy
Grand Bazaar opens, first tea glasses empty
lunch + dhuhr prayer, mantı queues
bazaar tea breaks, cats in every shadow
ferry silhouettes, magrib light over Galata
yaşa sofrası — family tables set
rituals.data: 🌙 magrib 19:47 · ⛴ last Kadıköy ferry 23:40 · trending: Erguvan Festivali

rituals.label: meyhane tables, raki slow, fasıl music drifting
rituals.data: 🎶 fasıl live in Beyoğlu meyhanes · IST arrivals today: 142

zones.seasonal: April · Judas trees erupting purple on the Bosphorus, tulip festival in Emirgan

zones.label: Tokyo
zones.region: Tokyo Bay · Pacific rim · Kuroshio current

rituals.label: last-train runners, cab lights on Omotesando
city exhale, Toyosu trucks arriving (ex-Tsukiji)
rituals.data: 🐟 Toyosu tuna auction 5:25 · 🌡 12°C · Shinkansen first run Tokyo 6:00

rituals.label: first light on the bay, joggers in Yoyogi
Yamanote crush, salary-reds behind newspapers
konbini coffee, morning desk hours
standing soba at the station
afternoon desk, cicadas in summer, AC in every conbini
evening rush, office lights on in Shinjuku
dash for the chuo line
izakaya, last train calculus

zones.seasonal: April · hanami winding down, fresh green (ao) taking over, 18°C

zones.label: Mexico City
zones.region: Valle de México · former Lake Texcoco · 2,240 m plateau

facts.air: MEX 8 mi E · NLU 30 mi N

rituals.label: taxis on Reforma, tortería neon on Álvaro Obregón

sweepers on Paseo, first micros rolling out
tamales oaxaqueños vendors steaming at every corner
rituals.data: 🌽 tamal verde 15 pesos · atole vendors working the Line 3 exits

rituals.label: Metrobús crush, schoolkids in navy-and-white
oficinas filling, juice vendors cutting mangos con chile
jacaranda petals drifting across Colonia Condesa
rituals.data: 🌸 jacarandas at peak · 24°C · UV 9 · air reddening by sunset

rituals.label: la comida · families + colleagues at the table, three hours

rituals.label: post-comida second wind, meetings resume in Polanco
Zócalo organilleros cranking, Catedral bells at 7
rituals.data: 🔔 Catedral Metropolitana bells 18:00 · organillero tip 5 pesos · Line 2 rush peak

rooftops in Roma Norte, last Metrobús 23:52

companions.label: Right now, where would you rather be?
